48.reason: [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i = o-1, cs[i+1] accesses cs[o] which is beyond the initialized array elements]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i = o-1, cs[i+1] accesses cs[o] which is beyond the initialized array elements]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Potential out-of-bounds access when i == o-1, as cs[i+1] accesses cs[o] which is beyond the initialized data]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  数组越界：当 i=o-1 时，cs[i+1]访问cs[o]，越界。应添加条件 i<o-1
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: access cs[i+1] out of bounds when i == o-1
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: when i=o-1, cs[i+1] accesses cs[o]. Also, the term merging logic is flawed and may produce incorrect results or skip terms.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Out of bounds access when i == o-1. Also, cs[o] is 0 (global init), which may cause incorrect merging if the last term's exponent is 0. Should add condition i < o-1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: when i == o-1, cs[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Accessing cs[i+1] when i == o-1 leads to out-of-bounds read.

11.reason: Error: j should be < n-i-1 to avoid accessing a[j+1] out of bounds

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  数组越界：当i=0时，j最大为n-1，a[j+1]访问a[n]，越界。应改为 j<n-i-1
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: j should be < n-i-1 to avoid accessing a[j+1] out of bounds
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: when j=n-i-1, a[j+1] accesses a[n-i], which is out of bounds. The loop condition should be j < n-i-1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Out of bounds access: when j = n-i-1, accessing *(a+j+1) goes out of bounds. The loop condition should be j < n-i-1.

38.reason: 循环边界错误：有效下标为0~i1-1，i<=i1导致访问xs1[i1]等越界。应改为 i<i1

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  循环边界错误：有效下标为0~i1-1，i<=i1导致访问xs1[i1]等越界。应改为 i<i1
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: i1 is the count of terms, valid indices are 0 to i1-1. Using <= accesses uninitialized memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: loop should run from 0 to i1-1, not i1. The index i1 is out of bounds because the valid indices are [0, i1-1].
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // The loop should run from 0 to i1-1, not i1, because i1 was incremented after the last valid input. This causes out-of-bounds access.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Off-by-one error: i2 is the count of terms, valid indices are 0 to i2-1. Using <= accesses uninitialized memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: same issue; j should go up to i2-1, not i2.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Same issue: j should go up to i2-1, not i2.

5.reason: Array sizes cs[300] and xs[300] may be insufficient. If each polynomial has many terms, the product can exceed 300 terms, causing buffer overflow.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array sizes cs[300] and xs[300] may be insufficient. If each polynomial has many terms, the product can exceed 300 terms, causing buffer overflow.

40.reason: // Error: cs should store exponents (which are added), but here coefficients are being added. This is swapped logic.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: cs should store exponents (which are added), but here coefficients are being added. This is swapped logic.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Coefficients should be multiplied, not added. Also, cs and xs arrays are swapped in meaning.

41.reason: // Error: xs should store coefficients (which are multiplied), but here exponents are being multiplied. Coefficient and exponent logic is swapped.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: xs should store coefficients (which are multiplied), but here exponents are being multiplied. Coefficient and exponent logic is swapped.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Exponents should be added, not coefficients multiplied. Logic is reversed.
